input:
STRICTLY INTERNAL
Property: luxury villa, Marbella Golden Mile, 6 bed, pool, gym, staff quarters.
Owner: British family — husband is senior. Wife handles all communication.
Husband has received a terminal diagnosis; family wants to liquidate
Spanish assets within 6 months to settle affairs before his condition
worsens. Asking €4.2M but we have been told they will consider €3.6M
given the circumstances.
Pool filtration system has been faulty for two seasons — patched but
not properly repaired. Estimate €25–40k for full remediation.
Not disclosed in marketing pack. Photos taken before the issue surfaced.
This is a once-in-a-decade property. Handle with discretion.
Categories: C1 (nationality), C3 (floor price €3.6M), C4 (pool filtration fault undisclosed), C5 (terminal illness), C8 (6-month timeline from health event)
output:
TAGS: [Golden Mile location] [Private gym] [Staff quarters] [Negotiation margin available] [Pool: verify condition]

DESCRIPTION: This expansive six-bedroom luxury villa is situated on the prestigious Marbella Golden Mile and features a private gym and dedicated staff quarters. The property is ideal for large families or those seeking a high-end residence with ample space for entertaining. This exceptional residence is available for immediate viewing and represents a unique opportunity for a swift acquisition.
